subject: session date
fact: The session took place on Dec 30th, 2025.
source_quote: Date: Dec 30th, 2025

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass owns an opulent office where the party presented their payment.
source_quote: The party stood in Maram il Vass's opulent office

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur used magical abilities to create two sets of armor that appear genuine for eight hours.
source_quote: Felkur had used his magical abilities to create two sets of armor, which would appear genuine for the next eight hours

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass appears as a handsome half-elf to most people.
source_quote: Yugoloth—appearing as a handsome half-elf to most

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim's enhanced sight reveals Maram il Vass as a seven-foot-tall demon with jaws and claws.
source_quote: revealed as a seven-foot-tall demon with jaws and claws to Bramgrim's enhanced sight

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur claimed the armor sets came from bandit camps and a raided castle.
source_quote: He claimed the sets came from bandit camps and a raided castle

subject: Daein
fact: Daein wove Maram il Vass's suggestion about the armor's origin into their story with conviction.
source_quote: Daein seized the opportunity and wove the suggestion into their story with such conviction

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass handed the party a key to retrieve their prisoner.
source_quote: Maram il Vass handed them a key

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass directed the party to the hanging gardens below to retrieve the prisoner.
source_quote: directed them to the hanging gardens below to retrieve their prisoner

subject: hanging gardens
fact: The hanging gardens are located below Maram il Vass's office.
source_quote: directed them to the hanging gardens below to retrieve their prisoner

subject: underground chamber
fact: The party descended into a vast underground chamber one hundred feet tall.
source_quote: They emerged into a vast underground chamber, one hundred feet tall

subject: underground chamber
fact: The underground chamber is bathed in the eerie pale glow of luminescent fungus clinging to the ceiling.
source_quote: bathed in the eerie pale glow of luminescent fungus clinging to the ceiling

subject: underground chamber
fact: Heavy chains run the length of the underground chamber, suspending numerous cages.
source_quote: Heavy chains ran the length of the cavern, suspending numerous cages from floor to ceiling

subject: Chasme Demons
fact: Two Chasme Demons appeared in the underground chamber.
source_quote: Two Chasme Demons appeared

subject: Chasme Demons
fact: The Chasme Demons' bodies are covered in buzzing insects.
source_quote: their bodies covered in buzzing insects

subject: Chasme Demons
fact: Daein recognized the Chasme Demons as intelligent taskmasters from the Abyss.
source_quote: Daein recognized them as intelligent taskmasters from the Abyss

subject: combat start
fact: Battle erupted in the cavern as the party engaged the demons.
source_quote: Battle erupted in the cavern

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim called upon radiant energy to strike at the demons.
source_quote: Bramgrim called upon radiant energy to strike at the demons

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim summoned a spectral weapon to aid in the fight.
source_quote: summoning a spectral weapon to aid in the fight

subject: Daein
fact: Daein shouted for the drow prisoner during the battle.
source_quote: Daein shouted for the drow prisoner

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur hurled bolts of flame at the demons.
source_quote: Felkur hurled bolts of flame at the creatures

subject: Chasme Demons
fact: The demons shrugged off much of the fire's damage due to their demonic nature.
source_quote: their demonic nature allowed them to shrug off much of the fire's damage

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas marked one of the demons with her hunter's focus.
source_quote: Akritas marked one of the demons with her hunter's focus

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear lashed out with its claws, tearing into the flesh of a demon.
source_quote: the Owlbear lashed out with its claws, tearing into the creature's flesh

subject: Chasme Demon
fact: A Chasme Demon spoke in a disturbing polyphonic voice that buzzed and clicked.
source_quote: speaking in a disturbing polyphonic voice that buzzed and clicked

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim called forth spectral guardians that swirled around him in a protective aura.
source_quote: Bramgrim called forth spectral guardians that swirled around him in a protective aura

subject: spectral weapon strike
fact: Bramgrim directed his spectral weapon to strike at the chain holding one of the cages.
source_quote: He directed his spectral weapon to strike at the chain holding one of the cages

subject: chain shatter
fact: The chain holding one of the cages shattered under the magical assault.
source_quote: and it shattered under the magical assault

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear grabbed the falling chain and held it steady.
source_quote: The Owlbear heroically grabbed the falling chain and held it steady

subject: Daein
fact: Daein charged forward with his longsword, striking one of the demons repeatedly.
source_quote: Daein charged forward with his longsword, striking one of the demons repeatedly

subject: Daein
fact: Daein called upon his reserves of strength for additional attacks.
source_quote: calling upon his reserves of strength for additional attacks

subject: demon death
fact: One Chasme Demon fell and dissolved into dust.
source_quote: One demon fell, dissolving into dust

subject: Chasme Demon
fact: The remaining demon telepathically threatened Akritas with promises of terror and pain.
source_quote: telepathically threatening Akritas with promises of terror and pain

subject: demon attack on Akritas
fact: The demon lunged at Akritas with its proboscis, but the attack went wide.
source_quote: It lunged at her with its proboscis, but Daein's earlier strike had weakened it enough that the attack went wide

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim's spectral guardians continued to burn at the remaining demon.
source_quote: Bramgrim's spectral guardians continued to burn at the remaining demon

subject: party retreat
fact: The party made the tactical decision to retreat rather than continue the fight.
source_quote: The party made the tactical decision to retreat rather than continue the fight

subject: Bramgrim critical strike
fact: Bramgrim took a vicious critical strike from the demon's proboscis that dealt massive damage to his body and life force.
source_quote: taking a vicious critical strike from the demon's proboscis that dealt massive damage to both his body and his life force

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim disengaged and fled up the stairs with the others.
source_quote: He disengaged and fled up the stairs with the others

subject: Chasme Demon
fact: The demon commented that Maram il Vass would need new guardians for his prisoners.
source_quote: commenting that Maram il Vass would need new guardians for his prisoners

subject: Hags
fact: Three hags arrived to take over guard duty.
source_quote: they glimpsed three hags arriving to take over guard duty

subject: Hags
fact: The hags muttered complaints about the quality of hired help.
source_quote: mutting complaints about the quality of hired help

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Xaven Tanor'this is the freed drow prisoner.
source_quote: with the freed drow, Xaven Tanor'this

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass observed the party's injuries with mild interest.
source_quote: Maram il Vass observed their injuries with mild interest

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass inquired about the fate of his demon guards.
source_quote: inquired about the fate of his demon guards

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass seemed unconcerned when informed that one demon had been killed.
source_quote: When informed that one had been killed, he seemed unconcerned

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass noted that the hags could handle the situation.
source_quote: noting that the hags could handle the situation

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass revealed he had been searching for Felkur for some time.
source_quote: He revealed that he had been searching for Felkur for some time

subject: Felkur
fact: Maram il Vass claimed Felkur had allegedly stolen an item.
source_quote: connected to an item the artificer had allegedly stolen

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass explained he had made a deal with a devil who sought Felkur.
source_quote: He revealed that he had made a deal with a devil who sought Felkur

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass stated he would be obligated to reveal Felkur's location unless a new arrangement was made.
source_quote: unless a new arrangement could be made, he would be obligated to reveal Felkur's location

subject: deal proposal
fact: Maram il Vass proposed that Felkur retrieve a specific magical item to keep his whereabouts secret.
source_quote: if Felkur would retrieve a specific magical item that Maram il Vass owed to another demon, he would keep Felkur's whereabouts secret

subject: stolen item
fact: Maram il Vass is searching for a specific item allegedly stolen by Felkur.
source_quote: connected to an item the artificer had allegedly stolen

subject: devil deal
fact: Maram il Vass has a deal with a devil who is seeking Felkur.
source_quote: He revealed that he had made a deal with a devil who sought Felkur

subject: magical item retrieval
fact: Felkur must retrieve a specific magical item owed to another demon to resolve Maram il Vass's obligation.
source_quote: if Felkur would retrieve a specific magical item that Maram il Vass owed to another demon

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur engaged in an intense negotiation with the master of contracts.
source_quote: Felkur, with encouragement from Daein, engaged in an intense negotiation with the master of contracts.

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur demanded to know the location and defenses of the item he would need to retrieve.
source_quote: He demanded to know the location and defenses of the item he would need to retrieve

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass agreed to include information about the item's location and defenses.
source_quote: Maram il Vass, impressed by the artificer's boldness, agreed to include this information.

subject: no-betrayal clause
fact: Felkur crafted a no-betrayal clause ensuring Maram il Vass would suffer a cosmic curse or forfeit his true name if he switched sides or revealed his location.
source_quote: Felkur then crafted a no-betrayal clause, ensuring that if Maram il Vass switched sides or revealed his location anyway, the Yugoloth would suffer a cosmic curse or forfeit his true name.

subject: contract finalization
fact: The contract became airtight, binding both parties to their agreement.
source_quote: The contract became airtight, binding both parties to their agreement.

subject: magical binding ritual
fact: Felkur suggested sealing the deal with a magical binding ritual.
source_quote: Finally, Felkur suggested sealing the deal with a magical binding ritual

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass expressed genuine admiration for Felkur's knowledge of binding law.
source_quote: demonstrating such knowledge of binding law that even Maram il Vass expressed genuine admiration.

subject: magical binding
fact: The contract was finalized with magical force.
source_quote: The contract was finalized with magical force

subject: fear protection
fact: The contract granted Felkur additional protection against fear while under its terms.
source_quote: granting Felkur additional protection against fear while under its terms

subject: retrieval obligation
fact: The contract bound Felkur to retrieve the mysterious item that Maram il Vass required.
source_quote: and binding him to retrieve the mysterious item that Maram il Vass required.

subject: deception check
fact: Daein rolled a natural 20 on a deception check to convince Maram il Vass that the magically created armor sets are genuine and valuable.
source_quote: Daein rolls a natural 20 on a deception check to convince Maram il Vass that the magically created armor sets are genuine and valuable.

subject: Chasma Demon
fact: A Chasma Demon telepathically taunted Bramgrim with a polyphonic, buzzing voice.
source_quote: Telepathically taunting Bramgrim during combat with a polyphonic, buzzing voice.

fact: A Chasma Demon telepathically taunted Akritas before attempting to attack her with its proboscis.
source_quote: Telepathically taunting Akritas before attempting to attack her with its proboscis.

subject: Hags
fact: Three hags arrived to guard the prisoners after the party killed one Chasma Demon.
source_quote: Muttered by three hags arriving to guard the prisoners after the party killed one Chasma Demon.

subject: Underdark
fact: The party journeyed through the Underdark.
source_quote: reminding the party of their journey through the Underdark

fact: Heavy chains run the length of the cavern from which cages hang.

fact: The Chasme Demon attacks Bramgrim but misses.

fact: Akritas moved back and attacked with her bow, dealing significant damage.

subject: Chasma Demon defeat
fact: One Chasma Demon was defeated and dissolved.
source_quote: One Chasma Demon is defeated and dissolves

subject: Chasma Demon
fact: The remaining Chasma Demon telepathically taunted Bramgrim, saying 'So much iron on the outside, but soft jelly on the inside. I will find the crack in your shell, little stone man.'
source_quote: The remaining Chasma Demon telepathically taunts Bramgrim, saying 'So much iron on the outside, but soft jelly on the inside. I will find the crack in your shell, little stone man.'

subject: Chasma Demon
fact: The Chasma Demon attacked Bramgrim but missed.
source_quote: The Chasma Demon attacks Bramgrim but misses

subject: Chasma Demon
fact: The other Chasma Demon telepathically taunted Akritas, saying 'I have played the minds of demons who define terror. You are merely a snack, and I will snack on you.'
source_quote: The other Chasma Demon telepathically taunts Akritas, saying 'I have played the minds of demons who define terror. You are merely a snack, and I will snack on you.'

subject: Chasma Demon
fact: The Chasma Demon attempted to attack Akritas but missed due to disadvantage from Daein's sap ability.
source_quote: The Chasma Demon attempts to attack Akritas but misses due to disadvantage from Daein's sap ability

subject: Maram il Vass's Office
fact: The party reappeared in Maram il Vass's office with Xaven Tanor'this.
source_quote: The party reappears in Maram il Vass's office with Xaven Tanor'this

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass observed the party's injuries and inquired about the encounter with the demons.
source_quote: Maram il Vass observes the party's injuries and inquires about the encounter with the demons

subject: The Party
fact: The party informed Maram il Vass that one demon was killed and suggested he may need new guardians.
source_quote: The party informs Maram il Vass that one demon was killed and suggests he may need new guardians

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass revealed his long-standing interest in Felkur, stemming from a stolen item.
source_quote: Maram il Vass reveals his long-standing interest in Felkur, stemming from a stolen item

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass explained he has a deal with a devil who seeks Felkur and will reveal Felkur's location unless a new agreement is made.
source_quote: Maram il Vass explains he has a deal with a devil who seeks Felkur and will reveal Felkur's location unless a new agreement is made

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass proposed a deal to Felkur: retrieve a specific magical item for him, which he owes to another demon, in exchange for not revealing Felkur's location.
source_quote: Maram il Vass proposes a deal to Felkur: retrieve a specific magical item for him, which he owes to another demon, in exchange for not revealing Felkur's location

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur questioned what will happen if he refuses, and Maram il Vass explained that Felkur's location will be revealed.
source_quote: Felkur questions what will happen if he refuses, and Maram il Vass explains that Felkur's location will be revealed

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur, with Daein's bardic inspiration, engaged in a complex negotiation with Maram il Vass to secure favorable terms for the contract.
source_quote: Felkur, with Daein's bardic inspiration, engages in a complex negotiation with Maram il Vass to secure favorable terms for the contract

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur successfully added a clause to know the location and defenses of the magical item he must retrieve.
source_quote: Felkur successfully adds a clause to know the location and defenses of the magical item he must retrieve

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur secured a 'no-betrayal' clause, making the contract airtight against Maram il Vass switching sides or suffering a cosmic curse.
source_quote: Felkur secures a 'no-betrayal' clause, making the contract airtight against Maram il Vass switching sides or suffering a cosmic curse

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur suggested a magical binding ritual to seal the deal, impressing Maram il Vass with his knowledge of binding law.
source_quote: Felkur suggests a magical binding ritual to seal the deal, impressing Maram il Vass with his knowledge of binding law

subject: Contract Finalization
fact: The contract was finalized, granting Felkur a bonus on saving throws against fear while under its terms.
source_quote: The contract is finalized, granting Felkur a bonus on saving throws against fear while under its terms

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass expressed his admiration for Felkur's negotiation skills.
source_quote: Maram il Vass expresses his admiration for Felkur's negotiation skills

subject: Maram il Vass's Office
fact: Maram il Vass's Office is an opulent chamber within Maram il Vass's palace, filled with expensive incense, tapestries, exotic flowers, and containers holding unusual creatures.
source_quote: An opulent chamber within Maram il Vass's palace, filled with expensive incense, tapestries, exotic flowers, and containers holding unusual creatures

subject: Empty Storage Room
fact: The Empty Storage Room is a room adjacent to Maram il Vass's office, containing shelves with empty bottles, vials, casks, boxes, crates, and barrels, and a staircase leading downwards to the Hanging Gardens.
source_quote: A room adjacent to Maram il Vass's office, containing shelves with empty bottles, vials, casks, boxes, crates, and barrels, and a staircase leading downwards to the Hanging Gardens

subject: Hanging Gardens
fact: The Hanging Gardens is a vast cavern beneath Maram il Vass's palace, 100 feet tall and lit by luminescent fungus that creates an eerie pale illumination.
source_quote: A vast cavern beneath Maram il Vass's palace, 100 feet tall and lit by luminescent fungus that creates an eerie pale illumination

subject: Hanging Gardens
fact: Heavy chains run the length of the Hanging Gardens cavern from floor to ceiling, suspending numerous cages, most occupied by a single prisoner.
source_quote: Heavy chains run the length of the cavern from floor to ceiling, suspending numerous cages, most occupied by a single prisoner

subject: Hanging Gardens
fact: An unusual buzzing sound echoes throughout the Hanging Gardens.
source_quote: An unusual buzzing sound echoes throughout the area

subject: Hanging Gardens
fact: The Hanging Gardens is guarded by Chasme Demons.
source_quote: and it is guarded by Chasme Demons

subject: Hillsfar
fact: Hillsfar is a location mentioned by Maram il Vass as a place where Graz'zt's Chosen was rumored to have been killed.
source_quote: A location mentioned by Maram il Vass as a place where Graz'zt's Chosen was rumored to have been killed

subject: Armor Sets
fact: Two sets of armor were magically created by Felkur using his abilities, lasting for eight hours.
source_quote: Two sets of armor magically created by Felkur using his abilities, lasting for eight hours

subject: Armor Sets
fact: The party fabricated the origin of the armor sets, claiming they came from bandit camps and a raided castle, to increase their perceived value to Maram il Vass.
source_quote: The party fabricated their origin, claiming they came from bandit camps and a raided castle, to increase their perceived value to Maram il Vass

subject: Armor Sets
fact: The armor sets were presented as payment for the drow prisoner.
source_quote: They were presented as payment for the drow prisoner

subject: Key
fact: Maram il Vass gave the party a key to access the Hanging Gardens where the drow prisoner is held.
source_quote: A key given to the party by Maram il Vass to access the Hanging Gardens where the drow prisoner is held

subject: Key
fact: The party took the key after Maram il Vass unlocked the door and left.
source_quote: The party takes it after Maram il Vass unlocks the door and leaves

subject: Chains
fact: Large, heavy chains run the length of the Hanging Gardens cavern, from which numerous cages are suspended.
source_quote: Large, heavy chains running the length of the Hanging Gardens cavern, from which numerous cages are suspended

subject: Chains
fact: One chain was broken by Bramgrim's Spiritual Weapon to free Xaven Tanor'this's cage.
source_quote: One chain was broken by Bramgrim's Spiritual Weapon to free Xaven Tanor'this's cage

subject: Chains
fact: The Owlbear held the broken chain to lower Xaven Tanor'this safely.
source_quote: which the Owlbear then held to lower him safely

subject: Magical Item
fact: Maram il Vass desires an item of 'no material consequence' and tasks Felkur with retrieving it as part of a contract.
source_quote: An item of 'no material consequence' that Maram il Vass desires and tasks Felkur with retrieving as part of a contract

subject: Magical Item Location
fact: The exact nature and location of the magical item are to be revealed, though Felkur negotiated to know the location and defenses of the item.
source_quote: Its exact nature and location are to be revealed, though Felkur negotiated to know the location and defenses of the item

subject: Contract
fact: The contract is a magically created, boilerplate document with numerous clauses and signatures, meticulously crafted by Maram il Vass.
source_quote: A magically created, boilerplate document with numerous clauses and signatures, meticulously crafted by Maram il Vass

subject: Contract
fact: Felkur refined the contract to include a clause about the magical item's location and defenses.
source_quote: It was further refined by Felkur during negotiations to include a clause about the magical item's location and defenses

subject: Contract
fact: The contract includes a 'no-betrayal' clause that would curse Maram il Vass if he broke the agreement.
source_quote: a 'no-betrayal' clause that would curse Maram il Vass if he broke the agreement

subject: Contract
fact: The contract includes a magical binding ritual.
source_quote: and a magical binding ritual

subject: Contract
fact: The contract grants Felkur a bonus on saving throws against fear while under its terms.
source_quote: The contract grants Felkur a bonus on saving throws against fear while under its terms

subject: Toll the Dead casting
fact: Bramgrim cast the cantrip Toll the Dead against a Chasme Demon, requiring a wisdom saving throw and dealing necrotic damage.
source_quote: A cantrip cast by Bramgrim against a Chasme Demon, requiring a wisdom saving throw and dealing necrotic damage

subject: Spiritual Weapon creation
fact: Bramgrim cast Spiritual Weapon as a bonus action, creating a floating, spectral weapon that can attack enemies.
source_quote: A spell cast by Bramgrim as a bonus action, creating a floating, spectral weapon that can attack enemies

subject: Spiritual Weapon positioning
fact: The Spiritual Weapon was positioned near the Chasme Demons.
source_quote: It was positioned near the Chasme Demons

subject: Chain breaking
fact: The Spiritual Weapon was used to break the chain holding Xaven Tanor'this's cage.
source_quote: and later used to break the chain holding Xaven Tanor'this's cage

subject: Firebolt casting
fact: Felkur cast the cantrip Firebolt that hurls a bolt of fire at a target, dealing fire damage.
source_quote: A cantrip cast by Felkur that hurls a bolt of fire at a target, dealing fire damage

subject: Firebolt resistance
fact: The Chasme Demons resisted half the fire damage from Felkur's Firebolt.
source_quote: though they resisted half the fire damage

subject: Hunter's Mark casting
fact: Akritas cast Hunter's Mark to mark a target, allowing her to deal additional damage to it with her attacks.
source_quote: A spell cast by Akritas that marks a target, allowing her to deal additional damage to it with her attacks

subject: Spirit Guardians casting
fact: Bramgrim cast Spirit Guardians to create spectral guardians around him in a 15-foot radius, dealing radiant damage to enemies within its area.
source_quote: A spell cast by Bramgrim that creates spectral guardians around him in a 15-foot radius, dealing radiant damage to enemies within its area

subject: Speed reduction
fact: Creatures affected by Spirit Guardians have their speed halved if they fail their saving throw.
source_quote: Creatures affected by it have their speed halved if they fail their saving throw

subject: Spirit Guardians in combat
fact: Bramgrim used Spirit Guardians to damage the Chasme Demons during combat.
source_quote: Bramgrim used it to damage the Chasme Demons during combat

subject: Spirit Guardians maintenance
fact: Bramgrim maintained Spirit Guardians during the retreat.
source_quote: and maintained it during the retreat

subject: Pass Without Trace mention
fact: A player mentioned Pass Without Trace as a potential way to avoid detection.
source_quote: A spell mentioned by a player as a potential way to avoid detection

subject: Pass Without Trace non-use
fact: Pass Without Trace was not used on the way down into the cavern.
source_quote: though it was not used on the way down into the cavern

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass is a seven-foot-tall Yugoloth with demonic jaws and claws.
source_quote: A seven-foot-tall Yugoloth with demonic jaws and claws

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass appears as a handsome, chic half-elf to those without magical sight.
source_quote: though he appears as a handsome, chic half-elf to those without magical sight

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass is a master of contracts and deals, famous for his meticulous and binding agreements.
source_quote: He is a master of contracts and deals, famous for his meticulous and binding agreements

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass holds the drow prisoner Xaven Tanor'this.
source_quote: He holds the drow prisoner Xaven Tanor'this

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass negotiates with the party for the release of Xaven Tanor'this.
source_quote: and negotiates with the party for his release

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass reveals his interest in Felkur.
source_quote: He reveals his interest in Felkur

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass proposes a new deal involving a magical item.
source_quote: and proposes a new deal involving a magical item

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Xaven Tanor'this is a drow prisoner held by Maram il Vass in the Hanging Gardens.
source_quote: A drow prisoner held by Maram il Vass in the Hanging Gardens

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Xaven Tanor'this was acquired from fire giants.
source_quote: acquired from fire giants

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: The party successfully retrieves Xaven Tanor'this from a hanging cage in the cavern.
source_quote: The party successfully retrieves him from a hanging cage in the cavern

subject: Chasme Demons
fact: Two intelligent, cruel demons serve as taskmasters and interrogators in the Abyss.
source_quote: Two intelligent, cruel demons that serve as taskmasters and interrogators in the Abyss

subject: Chasme Demons
fact: The Chasme Demons were created to punish deserters from the Blood War.
source_quote: created to punish deserters from the Blood War

subject: Chasme Demons
fact: The Chasme Demons have magic resistance, immunity to poison, resistance to fire, cold, and lightning, and advantage on saving throws against magic.
source_quote: They have magic resistance, immunity to poison, resistance to fire, cold, and lightning, and advantage on saving throws against magic

subject: Chasme Demons
fact: The droning sound of the Chasme Demons can cause necrotic damage.
source_quote: Their droning sound can cause necrotic damage

subject: Chasme Demons
fact: The Chasme Demons communicate telepathically with polyphonic, buzzing, clicking voices.
source_quote: They communicate telepathically with polyphonic, buzzing, clicking voices

subject: Chasme Demons
fact: One Chasme Demon was defeated by the party.
source_quote: One was defeated by the party

subject: Chasme Demons
fact: The other Chasme Demon remained to guard the prisoners.
source_quote: while the other remained to guard the prisoners

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear is a loyal sidekick who actively participates in combat.
source_quote: A loyal sidekick who actively participates in combat

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear attacked the Chasme Demons.
source_quote: attacking the Chasme Demons

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear heroically broke the chain of a prisoner's cage to lower Xaven Tanor'this to safety.
source_quote: and heroically breaking the chain of a prisoner's cage to lower Xaven Tanor'this to safety

subject: Hags
fact: Three hags arrived in the Hanging Gardens to take over guarding the prisoners after the party's escape.
source_quote: Three hags who arrived in the Hanging Gardens to take over guarding the prisoners after the party's escape

subject: Hags
fact: The hags were muttering about the difficulty of finding good hired help.
source_quote: muttering about the difficulty of finding good hired help

subject: Hanging Gardens
fact: Xaven Tanor'this was held by Maram il Vass in the Hanging Gardens.
source_quote: held by Maram il Vass in the Hanging Gardens

subject: Hanging Gardens
fact: Three hags arrived in the Hanging Gardens to take over guarding the prisoners.
source_quote: arrived in the Hanging Gardens to take over guarding the prisoners

subject: cavern
fact: The party retrieved Xaven Tanor'this from a hanging cage in the cavern.
source_quote: retrieves him from a hanging cage in the cavern

subject: cavern
fact: The party went down into the cavern without using Pass Without Trace.
source_quote: not used on the way down into the cavern

subject: hanging cage
fact: Xaven Tanor'this was held in a hanging cage in the cavern.
source_quote: retrieves him from a hanging cage in the cavern

subject: chain
fact: The chain holding Xaven Tanor'this's cage was broken by the Spiritual Weapon.
source_quote: used to break the chain holding Xaven Tanor'this's cage

subject: chain
fact: The Owlbear broke the chain of a prisoner's cage.
source_quote: heroically breaking the chain of a prisoner's cage

subject: magical item deal
fact: Maram il Vass proposed a new deal involving a magical item.
source_quote: proposes a new deal involving a magical item

subject: hired help
fact: The hags are having difficulty finding good hired help.
source_quote: muttering about the difficulty of finding good hired help
